name: supera
description: Repo-agnostic change-shipping superagent: supera-init, ship (full lifecycle — resume, pause, close-out), pr-watch, refactor, and audit (supply-chain + freshness auditors). One strong engineer agent does code + tests; behaviour is driven by a per-repo .claude/supera.json so the same skills work across pnpm, npm, cargo, Strapi, and more.
